{"id":"project-LICHEN-zrh2.2","title":"All impls: Per-neighbor SF tracking","description":"Implement per-neighbor SF tracking and adaptation.

## Shared logic
1. NeighborTable entry gains (sf, snr_avg, last_update) fields
2. On RX: update SNR average, evaluate SF change
3. On TX: lookup neighbor SF, use it
4. Parse/emit SF field in announces

## Data structure
struct NeighborSF {
  current_sf: u8,       // SF7-SF12
  snr_ewma: i8,         // exponential weighted moving average
  upgrade_count: u8,    // consecutive samples above threshold
  downgrade_count: u8,  // consecutive samples below threshold
}

## Python
- Add to GradientEntry or separate NeighborTable
- SF selection in TX path

## Rust
- Add SF tracking to neighbor state
- Wire to radio TX

## Zephyr
- Add to gradient table struct
- Kconfig: CONFIG_LICHEN_ADAPTIVE_SF_ENABLED
- Default SF: CONFIG_LICHEN_DEFAULT_SF=10","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:22:05.063528Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T18:22:05.063528Z","labels":["python","rust","zephyr","implementation","phy","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-zrh2.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-zrh2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:22:05.211019Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-zrh2.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-zrh2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:22:05.341861Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-zrh2.2","title":"All impls: Per-neighbor SF tracking","description":"Implement per-neighbor SF tracking and adaptation.

## Shared logic
1. NeighborTable entry gains (sf, snr_avg, last_update) fields
2. On RX: update SNR average, evaluate SF change
3. On TX: lookup neighbor SF, use it
4. Parse/emit SF field in announces

## Data structure
struct NeighborSF {
  current_sf: u8,       // SF7-SF12
  snr_ewma: i8,         // exponential weighted moving average
  upgrade_count: u8,    // consecutive samples above threshold
  downgrade_count: u8,  // consecutive samples below threshold
}

## Python
- Add to GradientEntry or separate NeighborTable
- SF selection in TX path

## Rust
- Add SF tracking to neighbor state
- Wire to radio TX

## Zephyr
- Add to gradient table struct
- Kconfig: CONFIG_LICHEN_ADAPTIVE_SF_ENABLED
